use tracing::{info, debug, info_span};

fn process_batch(records: &[Record]) {
    // GOOD: single batch span, debug-level per item
    let span = info_span!("batch", count = records.len());
    let _enter = span.enter();
    info!("starting batch");

    for record in records {
        debug!(id = record.id, "processing record");
        // process...
    }

    info!("batch complete");
}

struct Record {
    id: u64,
    name: String,
    data: Vec<u8>,
}
